/usr/bin/g++ -g -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/DVD-simulator.dir/link.d "CMakeFiles/DVD-simulator.dir/DVD-simulator_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/DVD-simulator.dir/main.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/DVD-simulator.dir/dvdsimulator.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/DVD-simulator.dir/build/Desktop-Debug/.qt/rcc/qrc_DVD-simulator_translations.cpp.o" -o DVD-simulator  -Wl,-rpath,:::::::::::::::::::::: /usr/lib/libQt6Widgets.so.6.11.0 /usr/lib/libQt6Gui.so.6.11.0 /usr/lib/libGLX.so /usr/lib/libOpenGL.so /usr/lib/libQt6Core.so.6.11.0
